resources.string: Scan a product, enter a barcode manually, or create a new item from this feature.
Align the barcode inside the frame.
Use the pencil icon if the barcode is damaged or hard to scan.
This product is read-only for your account. Editing requires the `products.write` permission.
Enter a name and a valid quantity. The price must be greater than or equal to 0.
Start adding items from the search tab to build the order.
Amount must cover the total of %1$s
Add products to the cart before checking out.
Order saved offline. It will sync automatically when you\'re back online.
Provide a title for the held order
Are you sure you want to delete order %1$s?
This order is synced to the server and will be deleted from both the device and server.
Failed to delete order from server
Please enter a valid email address
Network error. Please check your connection.
Please enter a valid URL (e.g., https://example.com/)
Try a different search or refine selection.
Continue loading the next inventory page.
Container stock will appear here once the server returns active container types.
Customer-held containers will appear here, ready to receive back into stock.
Track received, given, and adjustment activity for this container.
Try another filter or load more movements.
Pull to refresh or retry loading the movement history.
Leave blank to use required quantity
Select a customer to track containers.
Select a customer to track containers.
Enter the quantities received for each product:
Are you sure you want to cancel this procurement? This action cannot be undone.
Are you sure you want to remove %1$s from this BOM?
Enter the payment date in YYYY-MM-DD format.
Please enter a valid date in YYYY-MM-DD format
The wallet topup has been processed successfully.
Balances and tickets were refreshed for the successful payments. Failed tickets remain selected.
Are you sure you want to pay this ticket from the customer\'s wallet?
This customer has no unpaid orders.
Sell flow remains available. Orders will be submitted without register attribution until you open a register.
Products can still be added. Orders will be sent without a register until one is opened.
Checkout is still available. The order will be sent with no register assigned.
No closed register is available for this account right now.
Cash out amount cannot exceed the current register balance.
Register actions require an online connection.
Open a register or post cash movements to build the session history.
This order is no longer available on the device.
Secondary modules, sync tasks, and settings live here.
Store, API, printer, and device configuration.
Refresh products and categories from the server.
Production orders and bill of materials.
